title: Incorrect result set - Extra records in result set
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE unitTestRangeConditions (X INTEGER, Y VARCHAR(100), Z DECIMAL(10,3), W DATE);
INSERT INTO unitTestRangeConditions (X, Y, Z, W) VALUES (4, 'Dog', 3.14, '2023-01-01');
INSERT INTO unitTestRangeConditions (X, Y, Z, W) VALUES (5, 'Cat', 5.50, '2023-01-02');
SELECT * FROM unitTestRangeConditions WHERE X < 5 AND X >= 5;
SELECT * FROM unitTestRangeConditions WHERE Y < 'Cat' AND Y >= 'Cat';
key_bug_features: Ineffective range conditions in SQL queries
